title: dactylorchis praetermissa
intro: Dactylorchis praetermissa, also known as the autumn lady's tresses, is a rare species of orchid found in Europe and Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Dactylorchis praetermissa include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve drying and processing the roots to create teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
